scene_title: Sentinela medieval em torre com tocha ao amanhecer
narrative_beat: Armadura dourada e carmesim olhando o horizonte

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid solitary medieval sentinel in golden crimson armor at top of tower looking at horizon in active vigilance with lit torch against amber and scarlet dawn sky in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the solitary sentinel's vigilant posture with lit torch against the amber scarlet dawn
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern city horizon with grey skyscrapers in background
props: medieval sentinel in golden crimson armor

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber-scarlet grading, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: to watch is to discern — the sentinel as the viewer who arrived here

symbolism.primary: the sentinel as everyone who watched this video to the end
symbolism.secondary: lit torch as the knowledge that cannot be unseen

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
